question: Anthropic introduces a individual subscription beyond the 20x Max plan before June 1st?
reason: No evidence of Anthropic introducing a new individual subscription plan beyond 20x Max before June 1, 2026.
evidence: Anthropic's Max plan, introduced in April 2025, offers two tiers: Max 5x at $100/month and Max 20x at $200/month, with no indication of a higher-tier individual plan being announced.
Recent reports indicate that some Claude Max subscribers are experiencing a 50% price increase, suggesting potential price adjustments rather than the introduction of a new, more capable plan.
Anthropic has not made any official announcements regarding the launch of a new individual subscription plan beyond the existing Max 20x plan.
searchQueries: Anthropic new individual subscription plan beyond 20x Max before June 1, 2026
